features.description: Unit tests for pure helper functions in main.rs (backup_name_from_command, resolve_backup_name, backup_name_required, map_cli_location, map_cli_list_format, merge_skip_projections)

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test --bin chbackup -- test_backup_name_from_command test_resolve_backup_name test_backup_name_required test_map_cli_location test_map_cli_list_format test_merge_skip_projections 2>&1 | tee /dev/stderr | grep -oP '\d+ passed' | grep -oP '\d+'
layers.fail_message: Expected at least 20 main.rs tests to pass (got fewer or zero)

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Test-only code, no runtime binary behavior change

layers.justification: This plan modifies only test code and a CI threshold. There is no runtime binary behavior change. The behavioral layer already runs the full test suite and verifies all tests pass.
